headline: AT&T Stock’s Bad Week Just Keeps Getting Worse
summary: AT&T stock and Verizon Communications are falling once more. Both stocks have lost billions of dollars in market value this week on concerns around Elon Musk’s SpaceX potentially launching a mobile phone.

raw.headline: AT&T Stock’s Bad Week Just Keeps Getting Worse
raw.summary: AT&T stock and Verizon Communications are falling once more. Both stocks have lost billions of dollars in market value this week on concerns around Elon Musk’s SpaceX potentially launching a mobile phone.

headline: T-Mobile Joins America250 for Coast-to-Coast July 4 Celebrations
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., July 02, 2026--As America counts down to 250, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) will join America250, the national nonpartisan organization charged by Congress to lead the commemoration of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, to help American consumers and businesses stay connected and celebrate one of the country’s most historic weekends. headline: This Market Rotation From Tech Could Be a Longer-Term Adjustment
summary: U.S. sets up new trade limbo with Canada and Mexico, SpaceX emerges at threat to wireless providers, Kroger wades back into M&A, and more news to start your day.

headline: ASTS Stock Eases After 3-Day Run: FCC Opens Door For Direct Phone-To-Satellite Connectivity Using 800 MHz Spectrum
summary: AST SpaceMobile told the FCC it is “well-positioned to put the 800 MHz spectrum into use now,” citing 10 operational satellites capable of using the band.

raw.headline: ASTS Stock Eases After 3-Day Run: FCC Opens Door For Direct Phone-To-Satellite Connectivity Using 800 MHz Spectrum
raw.summary: AST SpaceMobile told the FCC it is “well-positioned to put the 800 MHz spectrum into use now,” citing 10 operational satellites capable of using the band.

headline: Elon Musk Calls Report on SpaceX AI Handheld Device ‘Utterly False’ After Claims of an iPhone Rival Sparks Online Buzz
summary: CEO Elon Musk denies reports that SpaceX is developing a handheld AI device, calling the claims “utterly false."

raw.headline: Elon Musk Calls Report on SpaceX AI Handheld Device ‘Utterly False’ After Claims of an iPhone Rival Sparks Online Buzz
